title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Bitcoin bulls Michael Saylor, Adam Back slam BIP-110 Ordinals proposal
summary: Bitcoin bulls Michael Saylor, Adam Back slam BIP-110 Ordinals proposal
briefing: The ongoing debate comes despite a broad downturn in Ordinals transaction activity over the last two years.

title: Empery Digital shares rise after selling Bitcoin to fund AI data center project
summary: Empery Digital shares rise after selling Bitcoin to fund AI data center project
briefing: The sales come months after a major Empery shareholder demanded the firm ditch its Bitcoin treasury strategy and force the resignation of its CEO and board.

title: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
summary: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
briefing: Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts said it's far too early to call $1 million by 2030, but he's confident Bitcoin could climb up to $250,000 over the next couple of years.

title: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
summary: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
briefing: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

title: Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit on Hedera
summary: Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit on Hedera
briefing: An attacker inflated the value of SAUCE collateral and borrowed $9 million from Bonzo Lend through a flaw in Supra’s onchain oracle verifier.

title: Bitcoin price gains nearly 10% in July, but traders still see BTC copying 2022 bear market
summary: Bitcoin price gains nearly 10% in July, but traders still see BTC copying 2022 bear market
briefing: Bitcoin price gains approached 10% for the first two weeks of the month, but analysis warned of the bear market returning from August onward.

title: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF paper
summary: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF paper
briefing: An IMF working paper says dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.

title: What Is Robinhood Chain? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network for Tokenized Stocks
summary: What Is Robinhood Chain? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network for Tokenized Stocks
briefing: Robinhood Chain is an Ethereum layer-2 network built with Arbitrum technology for tokenized assets, crypto apps, and on-chain financial products.

title: Nano Banana 2 Lite vs. Nano Banana 2: When to Save Your Money and When to Upgrade
summary: Nano Banana 2 Lite vs. Nano Banana 2: When to Save Your Money and When to Upgrade
briefing: Google's cheapest, fastest image model is a genuinely capable tool—until you need it to be great.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
summary: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
briefing: Apple alleges former employees took confidential designs, supplier information, and engineering files before joining OpenAI.

title: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits
summary: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits
briefing: Top Democrats on key Senate committees demanded inquiries into the more than $1.2 billion that President Trump made on crypto last year.

title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
summary: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
briefing: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.

title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
summary: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
briefing: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
summary: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
briefing: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.

title: Circle Stock Jumps as Stablecoin Issuer Wins Final Federal Banking Charter Approval
summary: Circle Stock Jumps as Stablecoin Issuer Wins Final Federal Banking Charter Approval
briefing: Circle secured final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, shifting its $73.2 billion stablecoin to a unified federal framework.
